---
title: Practice Markdown R
author: Felipe H. Flowers
output: 
  html_document: 
    toc: true
    highlight: zenburn
    theme: yeti
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------


## The Beginning

Hello World!

### Heading 3

#### Heading 4

##### Heading 5

###### Heading 6

**Click on my link [Flower Page Test](file:///C:/Users/st-lab105/Desktop/Felipe%20practice/flowerDarkWorldpractice2.html)**

```{r}
answer <- 2+4
answer
my_data <- cars
my_data
```

Behold my next masterpiece, `the plot()` function to plot a scatter plot!

```{r}
plot(my_data$speed ~ my_data$dist)
```

Thank you, okay?

## Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
